messages.content: Build a pure Decider for an AquaticFarm aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve using discriminated unions for Command, Event, and State. Throw DomainError when activating an already decommissioned farm.

Write an event-sourced Decider for a FishStock aggregate. Constraints: strict types, no any, exhaustive switch with never default, typed DomainError, reject harvesting more fish than currently stocked.
Build a pure Decider for a NetPen aggregate. The pen can be installed, fish-loaded, inspected, and retired. Reject loading fish into a retired pen.
Build a Decider for a HarvestWindow aggregate. It can be opened, extended, closed, and cancelled. Reject closing a window that was never opened.

Write a pure Decider for a WaterQualityLog aggregate. It supports opening a log, recording a reading, and closing. Strict types, exhaustive switch with never default, reject recordings after the log has been closed.
Build a pure Decider for a FeedingRegime aggregate. Commands: define, startFeeding, pauseFeeding, endRegime. Throw DomainError when pausing a regime that is not currently feeding.
What's the v1 way to build a read-model projection for FishStock totals? Show a minimal example with a project function and an emptyView.
Build a projection that tracks active HarvestWindow counts per farm. Include emptyView, a project function, and exhaustive matching on handled events.
Explain briefly how a projection differs from evolve, then show a typed WaterQualityLog projection that tracks the latest pH per log.
Write a projection for SeafoodBatch quality metrics. Constraints: strict types, no any, handle SeafoodBatchCreated, SeafoodBatchInspected, SeafoodBatchRejected; ignore events outside the view.

Build a TypeScript Snapshot with versioned upgrades for the NetPen aggregate. Include a CURRENT_VERSION constant, two upgrader functions (v1->v2, v2->v3), and a loader that runs the upgraders in order.
How do I version-upgrade a stored Snapshot for FeedingRegime from v1 to v3? Show a minimal loader with two upgrader steps.
Write a Snapshot upgrader for AquaticFarm. Constraints: strict types, two upgrade steps, typed Snapshot<S>, throw when the source version is unsupported.
Show how to append NetPen events with optimistic concurrency using expectedRevision. Convert server conflicts into a ConcurrencyConflict error.
Explain how optimistic concurrency with expectedRevision protects a FishStock stream, then show a typed appendToStream wrapper that surfaces ConcurrencyConflict.
Write an Effect-wrapped append path for a HarvestWindow stream with optimistic concurrency. Use Effect.gen to read the revision, compute events, and call appendToStream.
Build a CommandHandler over an EventStore for the FishStock aggregate. Load, decide, append with expectedRevision. Keep the orchestration logic out of decide.
Write an Effect-wrapped CommandHandler for a NetPen. Use Effect.gen to orchestrate readStream, reduce into state, decide, and appendToStream.
How do I build a CommandHandler for an AquaticFarm that loads via readStream, calls decide, and appends with expectedRevision? Show a minimal example.
Write a CommandHandler for a WaterQualityLog aggregate. Constraints: strict types, exhaustive decide, handler orchestrates only, no business logic outside decide.
Build a subscription runner for a FishStock projection that resumes from the last persisted checkpoint after restart. Write the checkpoint AFTER applying each event.
Write an Effect-wrapped subscription runner for SeafoodBatch events that updates a read model and persists checkpoints. Constraints: strict types, typed CheckpointStore, use Effect.gen.
Build a generic aggregateStream helper that folds an AsyncIterable of FeedingRegime events into state. Show one call site that reconstructs current state.
Show the v1 way to fold a stream of NetPen events into state with a when-style handler. Use a pure when(state, event) function and a reduce call.
Write an Effect-wrapped aggregateStream helper that replays AquaticFarm events. Use Effect.gen and a for-await loop inside the generator.
Explain how a when-style folder reconstructs WaterQualityLog state, then show a typed implementation with aggregateStream replaying events into the log.
Upcast older stored SeafoodBatch event shapes to the current version at read time. Include a typed raw union, a current union, and an upcast that throws UnknownEventError.
How do I upcast a stored FishStock event that changed shape between v1 and v2? Show a minimal upcaster keyed on type and version.
Build a read-model rebuild loop that wipes and re-projects the FishStock view from revision 0 in batches. Include progress reporting and a resumable from cursor.
Write a rebuild function for HarvestWindow read model. Constraints: strict types, from cursor for resume, chunked reads, persist per batch.
Build a CQRS boundary for SeafoodBatch. Writes go through decide + appendToStream, reads through a view store. Share the event DU, not state.
How do I split command and query paths for a NetPen? Show a minimal CQRS example with handleCommand and queryView.
Write a pure process-manager skeleton (saga) that reacts to HarvestWindow and FishStock events to coordinate a harvest run. Emit the next command or null.
How do I build a 3-step saga that moves a SmoltRelease through a hatchery pipeline? Show a pure (state, event) => { nextState, command? } step.
Translate a FishStockHarvested domain event into an integration event, and post it to an outbox in one transaction. Describe the publisher role in a comment without implementing it.
Build an outbox pattern for ProcessingLine events. Atomically append domain events and insert the integration rows in one transaction.

Here is a half-written NetPen decide that has a type error on the retire branch. Fix it so the exhaustive switch compiles and retiring a loaded pen is still allowed: `switch (command.type) { case 'install': return [{ type: 'NetPenInstalled', id: command.id, capacity: command.capacity }]; case 'retire': if (state.status !== 'installed') return []; return [{ type: 'NetPenRetired', at: command.at }]; }`

Refactor this inline FeedingRegime decide to split evolve and decide into reusable pure functions: `function handle(cmd,state){ if(cmd.type==='define'){ return {status:'defined', id:cmd.id, kcalPerDay:cmd.kcal}; } throw new Error('x'); }`
Add an audit capability to this FishStock Decider so FishStockAudited events can be recorded. Current Decider handles seed/harvest only. Keep strict exhaustive switches.
Add a translate step so this FeedingRegime domain event maps to an integration-event shape. Include a versioned schema field and a null return for unmapped events.
